name: ren-os
description: RenOS — an agentic OS for Claude Code: compounding memory you own, token discipline, governed autonomy. A plain-markdown wiki as your single source of truth + thin glue over native primitives.

plugins.name: ren
plugins.description: Agentic OS: compounding memory (single write queue, provenance, one-step revert), token discipline (measured, not estimated), governed autonomy (risk-tiered writes). See README.md for the full skill surface.
